componentDescription: A component to display a cookie consent banner, allowing users to accept or customize cookie preferences.

title.description: Specifies the main title text displayed in the cookie consent banner.

description.description: Provides the descriptive content or message shown within the cookie consent banner.
description.defaultValue: Ce site utilise des cookies pour améliorer votre expérience. En continuant à naviguer sur ce site, vous acceptez notre utilisation des cookies conformément à notre politique de confidentialité.

acceptButtonText.description: Sets the text for the button that accepts all cookies.

customizeButtonText.description: Sets the text for the button that allows users to customize cookie preferences.

position.description: Determines the display position of the cookie consent banner on the screen.

variant.description: Defines the visual style or layout variant of the cookie consent banner.

onAccept.description: Callback function executed when the user accepts all cookies.

onCustomize.description: Callback function executed when the user clicks the customize button.

views.description: Allows overriding default styles for specific parts of the cookie consent component.

showCustomizeButton.description: A boolean flag to control the visibility of the customize cookies button.

cookieExpiration.description: Sets the duration in days for which the cookie consent decision will be stored.

themeMode.description: Specifies the theme mode ('light' or 'dark') to apply to the cookie consent component.
